response: "the ghost of christmas yet to come is not the answer, but the mystery of the season is unfolding. the snowflakes fall in perfect harmony, and the world seems to pause in wonder. the daughter of the night watches over the land, and the daughter of the dawn brings light to the dark. the daughter of the moon whispers secrets to the stars, and the daughter of the earth holds the ground beneath our feet. the daughter of the heart beats with the rhythm of the wind, and the daughter of the soul is forever seeking the truth of the season. the daughter of the sky and the daughter of the sea are one, and the daughter of the mystery is the answer to all questions."
